description: Verify/build EmptyState + ErrorState + LoadingSkeleton shared components

component-consolidation.evidence: EmptyState: src/components/ui/EmptyState.tsx (icon + title + description + action CTA). ErrorState: src/components/ErrorState.tsx (icon + title + message + retry button, re-exported from ui/index.ts). Skeleton: src/components/ui/Skeleton.tsx consolidated — Skeleton, SkeletonText, SkeletonCard, StatCardSkeleton, TableRowSkeleton, CardSkeleton, BrandCardSkeleton, ProductCardSkeleton, PageLoadingSkeleton. Legacy components/Skeleton.tsx deleted. 5 files migrated from legacy to ui imports. 6 inline LoadingSkeleton functions replaced with shared PageLoadingSkeleton. All aria-hidden attributes added for accessibility.

build-gate.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit = 0 errors. npm run build = success.
